description: Generalized past medical history and past surgical history module. Ask once per session after complaint clerking and ROS unless an urgent complaint-specific safety question already captured the same concept earlier.
ui_render_rule: Use ui_label or text in the UI. Never show raw backend field ids.
module_ownership_principle: Generalized PMH and PSH are captured here first. Complaint files may ask only targeted follow-up when clinically necessary.
activation_rules: Run once per session after complaint clerking and ROS unless an emergent safety path requires earlier targeted history.
If past_medical_history or past_surgical_history was already captured earlier in the session, skip the matching question here.

questions.text: Do you have any past medical conditions we should know about?
Have you had any operations or procedures we should know about?

followup_guidance.principle: Keep this module generalized. Complaint files should ask specific PMH or surgical follow-up only when the complaint, red flags, or earlier answers make that detail decision-relevant.
examples: abdominal pain may ask about prior abdominal surgery if obstruction or adhesions are being considered
hematuria may ask about anticoagulant use elsewhere through the appropriate module or complaint-specific follow-up
back pain may ask about history of cancer as a targeted red-flag follow-up rather than expanding this module
